name: x402 Data Bazaar
description: Real-world data APIs for AI agents - weather, nutrition, VIN, census, FDA, compliance, and more.
instructions:
# x402 Data Bazaar

Real-world data APIs. Pay per request with USDC on Base.

## Endpoints
- GET /api/vin/{vin} - VIN decode ($0.008)
- GET /api/weather/current/{lat}/{lon} - Weather decision brief ($0.005)
- GET /api/weather/current?lat=X&lon=X - Weather decision brief, query style ($0.005)
- GET /api/weather/forecast?lat=X&lon=X&days=N - Daily forecast up to 16 days ($0.008)
- GET /api/holidays/today/{country} - Business day check ($0.008)
- GET /api/business-days/next/{country}/{date} - Next business day ($0.008)
- GET /api/holidays/{country}/{year} - Full year holidays ($0.008)
- GET /api/exchange-rates/quote/{base}/{target}/{amount} - FX conversion ($0.012)
- GET /api/exchange-rates/{base} - FX matrix for a base currency ($0.012)
- GET /api/ip/{ip} - IP geolocation ($0.003)
- GET /api/food/barcode/{upc} - Product lookup by UPC ($0.003)
- GET /api/nutrition/search?query=X - USDA nutrition search ($0.008)
- GET /api/fda/recalls - Current FDA food recalls ($0.008)
- GET /api/fda/adverse-events - Drug adverse event reports ($0.008)
- GET /api/census/population - US population, income, age ($0.008)
- GET /api/bls/cpi - Consumer Price Index ($0.008)
- GET /api/bls/unemployment - Unemployment rate ($0.008)
- GET /api/air-quality/{zip} - AQI by ZIP code ($0.008)
- GET /api/congress/bills - Current legislation ($0.008)
- GET /api/ofac-sanctions-screening/{name} - OFAC sanctions screen ($0.005)
- GET /api/restricted-party/screen/{name} - Legacy OFAC alias ($0.005)
- GET /api/vendor-onboarding/restricted-party-batch?names=A|B - Batch OFAC screen ($0.15)
- GET /api/vendor-entity-brief?name=X - Vendor compliance brief ($0.25)

## Payment
USDC on Base. x402 v2 protocol. Paid endpoints return 402 with payment details until settled.

## Categories
- real-time-data/weather: current conditions, forecasts, AQI
- data/finance: FX rates
- data/government: census, congress, holidays, business days, BLS
- data/health: FDA recalls, adverse events, nutrition
- data/reference: VIN decode, IP geolocation, food barcode
- identity: OFAC/restricted-party screening and vendor risk
